该模型中信息优势方通过可置信行为向信息劣势方传递自身偏好，消除了双方的信息不对称，降低了主管决策的不确定性，推动转正事项得到明确结果
雇主 payroll的待办任务构成排队服务系统，服务顺序由任务优先级决定，干预将该问题从低优先级队列移入高优先级队列，改变服务顺序缩短了问题处理等待时间
劳动者通过逐步升级的维权行动，让雇主基于观测到的行动完成贝叶斯更新，提高雇主对劳动者会采取正式投诉维权的后验概率，倒逼雇主主动优先解决问题

This model resolves the information asymmetry in the recruitment market, converts the previously unobservable ability into a credible signal through on-site work performance, breaks the access barrier of personal network signal, and allows employers to correctly identify the candidate's ability

This model re-matches the candidate's unique qualifications (educational technology, special education experience) to positions with unmet supply gaps, eliminates the original mismatch, and achieves a stable matching equilibrium

This model holds that 80% of outcomes come from 20% of inputs. In this strategy, only 20% of high-frequency interview test sites are focused, which maximizes the efficiency of obtaining the ability required for the interview in limited time and solves the problem of insufficient preparation time.

将整体决策拆解为先后执行的两个步骤，先确认关系层的搬迁可行性排除底层不可行解，再推进雇佣端的议价，避免提前投入后才发现核心约束不可满足，减少不可逆损失

This model finds the maximum value of the objective function under given constraints. Here the objective function is the sum of long-term career gains and family welfare, constraints include limited total time, family income safety line and the hard degree threshold for target jobs. The solution reallocates time from low-value original work to high-value degree and skill acquisition, which is the optimal solution given by the model.

Original full-time work occupies most time, leading to delayed degree and stagnant skill accumulation, which in turn keeps the user stuck in the original work, forming a stable negative feedback that maintains the non-optimal steady state. The intervention cuts off the causal chain of the loop, driving the system to evolve to a better steady state.

该模型描述通过建立缓冲储蓄应对随机支出冲击的机制，本策略先建立小额应急缓冲，避免突发支出触发再次借贷，打破原有负债负循环

This model gives the optimal stop rule for incomplete information search, advance verification of whether the position budget meets the job seeker's reservation wage can terminate the mismatched process early, minimizing the invalid time cost of search.

In this model, the party with private information actively sends a signal to eliminate the information asymmetry between the two parties, avoiding the invalid interview cost caused by information hiding in advance.

This model defines the equilibrium solution of the two-person bargaining problem, and proves that the final share of surplus distributed to participants increases with the increase of the reservation return when the agreement is not reached. Bargaining before project delivery when the reservation return is the highest maximizes the user's deserved compensation share.
